label: Stripe Checkout
description: Subscription and one-time payments via Stripe Checkout (hosted page) — månadsbetalning, recurring billing, SaaS abonnemang.
summary: Use this dossier when a site needs Stripe-hosted checkout for one-time purchases or subscriptions without building a custom card form. It provides the core server/client wiring: a Stripe SDK helper, an API route that creates Checkout Sessions, and a reusable button that redirects users to Stripe Checkout.

envVars.purpose: Server-side Stripe API authentication. Use a test-mode key for development.
Client-side Stripe.js initialization. Safe to expose.
Used for Stripe success/cancel redirect URLs. Example: https://example.com

_deprecationReason: Source repo vercel/nextjs-subscription-payments was archived on GitHub jan 2025 (449d ago). Vercel's own template page links to the replacement (see _replacementUrl). Re-curate against the new repo before marking active again. Current dossier code still works — it's just not aligned with Next 16 / latest Stripe SDK patterns.
